programme.title: Zulu Dawn
programme.desc: In 1879 South Africa, British Cape Colony administrators seek to crush the Zulus, viewing them as an obstacle to their colonial ambitions. To provoke war, they issue King Cetshwayo an impossible ultimatum, confident their rifles and artillery will ensure an easy victory. But as Lord Chelmsford's forces chase an unseen foe, they discover near Isandlwana how gravely they've underestimated the Zulu nation's skill and strength.

programme.title: Sommersby
programme.desc: A farmer returns home from the Civil War, but his wife begins to suspect that the man is an impostor.

programme.title: Cheer for your Life
programme.desc: A high school girl feels defeated during a rough Cheerleader Initiation Week, but her dreams aren't the only thing at stake when another cheerleader ends up dead.

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.
